_note: torchao 0.49.x renamed `float8_dynamic_activation_float8_weight` to a class-based config, AND the C extensions failed to load entirely (`Failed to load _C_mxfp8.so`, `_C_cutlass_90a.abi3.so`). Per the script's decision rule (DEFER on import error), MXFP8 is out of Phase 1.
error: torchao import failed: ImportError: cannot import name 'float8_dynamic_activation_float8_weight' from 'torchao.quantization' (/venv/main/lib/python3.12/site-packages/torchao/quantization/__init__.py)
decision: DEFER MXFP8 to Phase 2 (torchao not importable on this PyTorch nightly + Blackwell combo)
phase2_notes: Re-evaluate when torchao stabilizes API + ships sm_120 C-extension wheels for nightly cu128.
Alternative fp8 paths to investigate in Phase 2: TransformerEngine (NVIDIA), torch native fp8 ops, or wait for official torchao Blackwell support.
We did not get to measure the bf16-vs-fp8 logit drift, since the model was never quantized.
